channel.title: TABIJI
channel.description: Japan travel guides written for real trips

item.title: The Perfect 7-Day Japan Itinerary for First-Timers
item.description: Tokyo, Hakone, Kyoto, Nara and Osaka in one smooth week — the classic Golden Route, with exact train moves and where to sleep each night.

item.title: Getting Around Japan: Trains, IC Cards & When a JR Pass Is Worth It
item.description: The 10-minute guide to Japanese trains: Suica on your phone, booking Shinkansen seats, luggage rules, and the honest math on rail passes.

item.title: Tokyo
item.description: Neon canyons, quiet shrines and the best food city on Earth

item.title: Kyoto
item.description: A thousand years of temples, tea houses and lantern-lit lanes

item.title: Osaka
item.description: Japan's kitchen — loud, friendly and outrageously delicious

item.title: Nara
item.description: Bowing deer, a giant Buddha, and Japan's first capital

item.title: Hakone & Mt. Fuji
item.description: Hot springs, ropeways and the perfect Fuji view

item.title: Hiroshima & Miyajima
item.description: A moving peace memorial and a floating torii gate

item.title: Sapporo & Hokkaido
item.description: Powder snow, miso ramen and wide-open wilderness

item.title: Fukuoka
item.description: Yatai street stalls, tonkotsu ramen and easygoing Kyushu charm

item.title: Okinawa
item.description: Coral seas, island time and a culture all its own
